tlc.details: Model checking completed. No error has been found. | 17 states generated, 13 distinct states found, 0 states left on queue.

validator.output: All 11 panels pass dimensions (800/1000/1200 wide), palette discipline, Maya presence, and SVG tag balance.

human_review.scope: Visual quality of comic panels (UNVERIFIABLE:OUT_OF_SCOPE - mechanical verification cannot speak to expressive quality)
human_review.process: For each of the 11 panels, the reviewer confirms: (a) emotional_beat visible in Maya's face/posture, (b) background carries meaning, (c) continuity with previous panel, (d) text sizes ≥ 18px, (e) IT humor lands in CHUCKLED panels only (1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 11) and not in UNCERTAIN panels (4, 5).
human_review.trigger: before-merge to main; before-release as primary narrative
human_review.re_verification: If a panel is reworked, run bin/verify and validate-panels.sh, then this human_review trigger fires for the affected panel only.
checklist: panel 01 (1000x700): Maya confident, SO logo sticker, 'it compiles' comment
panel 02 (800x600): Maya triumphant, red x in confetti premonition, clock tooltip
panel 03 (800x600): three users, 'works on my machine' joke
panel 04 (1200x900 CLIMAX): Maya panicked face LARGE, multiple tabs, bug at intersection
panel 05 (1000x700): Maya alone, lamp, red glow, empty chair
panel 06 (1000x700): Mentor + tablet, I ♡ TLA+ easter egg
panel 07 (1000x700): Maya focused, 'please work' comments, 'try Stack Overflow'
panel 08 (1200x900 CLIMAX): TLC beam, bug in spotlight, '0 regrets' easter
panel 09 (1000x700): Maya pointing at verified diagram, bug in box
panel 10 (1000x700): panoramic, 'yes, really' italic, dual-verified badges
panel 11 (800x600): VERIFIED stamp rotated, 'all your tests are belong to us'
